title: AL's Piglins Revamped
description: A pack that revamps Piglins and Hoglins and adds more variants!
body:
![Piglins Revamped logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b6de22e7055af824e768eb0463cffd337f3c1074.png)

# 

A pack that revamps Piglins and Hoglins and adds more variants by changing the models and textures!

I made this as a more "Vanilla style" pack while still giving them a well needed revamp.

 

This pack adds Biome-variants based on Minecraft Legends as well as new models for things like Piglin Brutes, Baby Piglins!

Hoglins get Biome-variants as well as a slightly improved model with a 3D tail and bigger tusks.

Regular Piglins also have different textures depending on if they're holding a Sword, Crossbow, or even wearing Armor!

 

You can also get a Nametag-only easter egg if you rename a Piglin Brute to:

*Suichopath

 

Make sure that these are all set to "ON":

Custom Entity Models
Random Entities

Emissive Textures

You can find these toggles by going into:

Options>Video Settings>Quality
